text:
ət'aek till we are Ashes is the 4th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 03, as well as the 4th track on disc 3 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed by Kohta Yamamoto and Hiroyuki Sawano and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

Musical motifs

The track is a mix of ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn and Ashes on The Fire.

All occurrences

Special 2 and Episode 91 - The fight against the past generations of the Nine Titans begins
